description.en: Implement phone-based OTP verification via WhatsApp and SMS. Secure user signups, signins, 2FA, and high-value payments.
description.pt: Implemente verificação OTP via WhatsApp e SMS. Proteja cadastros, logins, 2FA e transações financeiras.
description.es: Implemente verificación OTP vía WhatsApp y SMS. Proteja registros, inicios de sesión, 2FA y transacciones.
description.id: Implementasikan verifikasi OTP melalui WhatsApp dan SMS. Amankan pendaftaran, login, 2FA, dan transaksi.
description.ar: نفّذ التحقق من OTP بالهاتف عبر واتساب وSMS. أمّن تسجيلات الدخول والتحقق الثنائي والمدفوعات.
description.tr: WhatsApp ve SMS üzerinden OTP doğrulaması uygulayın. Üye kayıtlarını, girişleri, 2FA ve ödeme onaylarını güvenceye alın.

title.pt: Verificação Segura de Usuários com OTP
title.es: Verificación Segura de Usuarios con OTP
title.ar: التحقق الآمن من المستخدمين باستخدام OTP

subtitle.en: Add phone-based OTP verification to your app in minutes. Support sign-up verification, two-factor authentication, password resets, and transaction confirmations via WhatsApp or SMS.
subtitle.pt: Adicione verificação OTP por telefone ao seu app em minutos. Suporte para verificação de cadastro, 2FA, redefinição de senha e confirmações de transação via WhatsApp ou SMS.
subtitle.es: Agregue verificación OTP por teléfono a su app en minutos. Soporte para verificação de registro, 2FA, restablecimiento de contraseña y confirmaciones vía WhatsApp o SMS.
subtitle.id: Tambahkan verifikasi OTP berbasis telepon ke aplikasi Anda dalam hitungan menit. Dukungan untuk verifikasi pendaftaran, 2FA, reset password, dan konfirmasi transaksi via WhatsApp atau SMS.
subtitle.ar: أضف التحقق من OTP بالهاتف إلى تطبيقك في دقائق. دعم التحقق من التسجيل والمصادقة الثنائية وإعادة تعيين كلمة المرور وتأكيد المعاملات عبر واتساب أو SMS.
subtitle.tr: Dakikalar içinde uygulamanıza telefon tabanlı OTP doğrulaması ekleyin. Kayıt doğrulaması, 2FA, şifre sıfırlama ve işlem onaylarını WhatsApp veya SMS ile destekleyin.

description.en: Your app collects the user's phone number during sign-up, login, or transaction.
POST /otp/send with the phone number. We generate a random code and deliver it via WhatsApp (preferred) or SMS.
The user receives the OTP on their phone and enters it in your app's verification screen.
POST /otp/verify with the request_id and code. We confirm the match and return verified: true/false.

body.en: OTP delivery failures directly cause customer drop-offs. By routing authentication codes WhatsApp-first, you bypass network congestion and carrier spam block lists. Supported Android devices enable single-tap verification autofills, boosting conversions.

heading.en: WhatsApp OTP Verification vs. Traditional SMS OTP vs. Email Authentication

subheading.en: Compare delivery rates, latency speed, user setup complexity, and costs.

overlayText.en: OTP Verification API Sandbox — Coming Soon

question.en: What's the best practice for OTP expiry time?

answer.en: We recommend 5 minutes for standard sign-up/login OTPs and 2-3 minutes for high-security transactions (payments, password resets). Our API supports configurable expiry from 30 seconds to 30 minutes. Shorter expiry times are more secure but may cause friction for users on slow connections.

question.en: Are there local technical conditions for sending OTP verification codes?
question.in: What are the DLT registration rules for fallback SMS OTP in India?
question.ng: How reliable is SMS OTP fallback during network outages in Nigeria?
question.tr: KVKK veri işleme kuralları OTP doğrulama logları için nasıl geçerlidir?

answer.en: Yes. OTP parameters and fallback routing vary by regional regulatory standards.
answer.in: In India, DLT registration requires you to associate your SMS templates with a registered Principal Entity (PE) ID and a Sender ID (Header). StartMessaging maps these variables dynamically so that if a WhatsApp OTP fails to deliver, the fallback SMS matches DLT compliance and delivers immediately.
answer.ng: Network fluctuations are common in Nigeria. By routing OTPs WhatsApp-first, we deliver securely over data connections. If WhatsApp is unavailable, our direct integrations with local telcos (MTN, Airtel, Glo, 9mobile) trigger an immediate, high-priority fallback SMS with premium sender routes to ensure delivery.
answer.tr: KVKK kapsamında, OTP doğrulama amacıyla toplanan telefon numaraları ve doğrulama logları kişisel veri statüsündedir. Bu veriler yalnızca doğrulama amacı doğrultusunda işlenmeli ve rıza dışı pazarlama faaliyetlerinde kullanılmamalıdır. Sunucularımız KVKK veri güvenliği standartlarıyla tam uyumludur.
